name: Creation of Encrypted Winrar archive via CLI
description: This prompt is designed to detect the creation of an encrypted RAR archive using the command-line interface of WinRAR (`rar.exe`). Attackers often use this technique for defense evasion by exfiltrating data in an encrypted format to bypass data loss prevention (DLP) systems and make it difficult for security analysts to inspect the contents. The prompt focuses on the use of the `'-hp'` flag, which indicates the use of a password to encrypt the archive.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event where the `rar.exe` process (`{image}`) was executed with the command line `{command}` at `{timestamp}` on the host `{hostname}`. The command includes the `'-hp'` flag, which indicates the creation of an encrypted archive. Analyze the files being compressed and encrypted (`{target_files}`). Identify the user (`{user}`) and the parent process (`{parent_process}`) that initiated this activity. Determine if this is a legitimate activity or a potential data exfiltration attempt. Provide a summary of your findings and any recommended actions.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed (should be rar.exe).

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line of the rar.exe process, including the '-hp' flag.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the event was detected.

parameters.name: target_files
parameters.description: The files or directories that were compressed and encrypted.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the command was executed.

parameters.name: parent_process
parameters.description: The parent process that initiated the rar.exe command.
